name: aibake
description: AiBake - Professional baking recipe management platform

scripts.build: npm run build --prefix middleware && npm run build --prefix backend
scripts.test: npm run test --prefix middleware && npm run test --prefix backend
scripts.lint: npm run lint --prefix middleware && npm run lint --prefix backend
scripts.format: npm run format --prefix middleware && npm run format --prefix backend
scripts.type-check: npm run type-check --prefix middleware && npm run type-check --prefix backend
scripts.install:all: npm install --prefix backend && npm install --prefix middleware
